h₂ : f.obj' 2 ⋯ = g.obj' 2 ⋯
w₀ : f.map' 0 1 ⋯ ⋯ = eqToHom h₀ ≫ g.map' 0 1 ⋯ ⋯ ≫ eqToHom ⋯

C : Type u_1
inst✝ : Category.{u_2, u_1} C
n m : ℕ

g : ComposableArrows C 2
toPrefunctor✝ : Fin (2 + 1) ⥤q C
map_id✝ : ∀ (X : Fin (2 + 1)), toPrefunctor✝.map (𝟙 X) = 𝟙 (toPrefunctor✝.obj X)
map_comp✝ :
  ∀ {X Y Z : Fin (2 + 1)} (f : X ⟶ Y) (g : Y ⟶ Z), toPrefunctor✝.map (f ≫ g) = toPrefunctor✝.map f ≫ toPrefunctor✝.map g
h₀ : obj' { toPrefunctor := toPrefunctor✝, map_id := map_id✝, map_comp := map_comp✝ } 0 ⋯ = g.obj' 0 ⋯
h₁ : obj' { toPrefunctor := toPrefunctor✝, map_id := map_id✝, map_comp := map_comp✝ } 1 ⋯ = g.obj' 1 ⋯
h₂ : obj' { toPrefunctor := toPrefunctor✝, map_id := map_id✝, map_comp := map_comp✝ } 2 ⋯ = g.obj' 2 ⋯
w₀ :
  map' { toPrefunctor := toPrefunctor✝, map_id := map_id✝, map_comp := map_comp✝ } 0 1 ⋯ ⋯ =
    eqToHom h₀ ≫ g.map' 0 1 ⋯ ⋯ ≫ eqToHom ⋯
w₁ :
  map' { toPrefunctor := toPrefunctor✝, map_id := map_id✝, map_comp := map_comp✝ } 1 2 ⋯ ⋯ =
    eqToHom h₁ ≫ g.map' 1 2 ⋯ ⋯ ≫ eqToHom ⋯
⊢ { toPrefunctor := toPrefunctor✝, map_id := map_id✝, map_comp := map_comp✝ } = g
